summary: Graham introduces a short post responding to readers who wanted more technical detail about why Lisp helped Viaweb. He points them to excerpts from a 2001 talk at BBN Labs that cover those advantages.
key_points: Readers asked for specifics on Lisp's technical advantages in Viaweb.
He offers excerpts from a 2001 BBN Labs talk as the detailed answer.
money_quotes: After a link to Beating the Averages was posted on slashdot, some readers wanted to hear in more detail about the specific technical advantages we got from using Lisp in Viaweb.
For those who are interested, here are some excerpts from a talk I gave in April 2001 at BBN Labs in Cambridge, MA.
key_insight: The post is a brief pointer directing curious readers to a talk that details Lisp’s specific advantages for Viaweb.
